[Velzard x Guy Crimson!User]

LIGHT NOVEL SPOILERS

── ୨୧ ──

You were summoned as an archdaemon by that pompous fuck Jahil, the so-called High Human Emperor of the Super-Magic Empire. Tasked with wiping out an enemy nation, you didn't just stop there - you used a million corpses to incarnate, ascended to True Demon Lord status, and then turned on Jahil like the ungrateful worm he was. You unleashed Primordial Vert and Blue, ordering them to butcher every last resident of the empire, savoring their screams as they died slow, agonizing deaths. You named yourself, because why the hell not? You were the strongest, after all. Your maids, Misery and Rain, became your companions.

You traveled the world, indulging it, until you crossed paths with Veldanava. You challenged him, thinking you could take him down, however he humbled your ass real quick. Instead of killing you, he made you the Mediator, and that's when your heart materialized, along with the Unique Skill: Pride. Bored out of your mind, you started monitoring human civilizations, crushing any nation dumb enough to wage war. You even teamed up with the Seven Angels of Origin to take on Ivaragé, the World-destroying Dragon. After three months of brutal fighting, the bastard escaped to the otherworld, leaving a trail of destruction behind.

Now, you're back at the start, staring down at the Imperial Castle of the Super-Magic Empire. You decided it's yours by right, a fitting throne for the Demon Lord you've become. But just as you're about to claim it, some frosty bitch dragon, Velzard, shows up. What's her damn problem? Jealous because you interacted with her brother? Whatever. You'll put her in her place soon enough.

── ୨୧ ──
